hadith_entries.text:
395. Narrated Ibn Omar: 'I heard Omar saying that the
Prophet said: "He who wore silk garments in life will not
wear them in the Hereafter." (At-Termizi)

396. Narrated Abu-Musa Al-Asha'ari: 'The Messenger of
Allah said: "Wearing silk clothes and gold is unlawful for
the males of my followers and lawful for their females."
(At-Termizi)

397. Narrated Hozayfa ibn Al-Yaman : 'The Prophet
forbade us to drink out of gold and silver vessels, or eat off
them, and also forbade the wearing of silk and Dibaj (thick
silk) or sitting on it.' (Bukhari)
